gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/152)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/152)
text: شَكَوْتُ إِلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) قِلَّةَ الْوَلَدِ فَقَالَ لِي اسْتَغْفِرِ اللَّهَ وَ كُلِ الْبَيْضَ بِالْبَصَلِ .

en.hubeali: Abu Ali Al Ashary, from Muhammad Bin Salim, from Ahmad Bin Al Nazar, from Umar Bin Abu Hasana Al Jammal who said,
‘I complained to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> of the scarcity of the births (children). So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘Seek Forgiveness of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> and eat the eggs with the onions’.
en.sarwar: 2. Abu Ali al-Ash‘ariy has narrated from Muhammad ibn Salim from Ahmad ibn al-Nadr from ‘Umar ibn abu Hasnah al-Jammal who has said the following: “I once complained before abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about not having any children. He (the Imam) said, ‘Ask forgiveness from Allah and eat eggs with onion.”’
